services.name: Error State
services.description: The module will return an error code to indicate the error and will enter the Error state. Any further cryptographic operation is inhibited.
services.roleAccess: Failure of pre- operational tests or conditional tests.
services.indicator: An error message related to the cause of the failure (e.g. GPG_ERR_SELFTEST_FAILED).

extraColumns.col3: The error can be recovered by a restart (i.e., powering off and powering on) of the module.

services.name: Fatal Error state
services.description: The module will abort and will not be available.
services.roleAccess: Random numbers are requested in the error state or cipher operations are requested on a deallocated handle.

extraColumns.col3: The error can be recovered by a restart (i.e., powering off and powering on) of the module.
